title: Software Update - Release Notes link
scenario: Release Notes popup displays correctly when accessed via Device Settings > Software Update link during firmware update
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected.
3. Confirm the headset is NOT on the latest firmware (i.e., a firmware update is available).
4. Tap the connected device name to open Device Settings.
6. Locate the blue firmware version text next to 'Update Available'.
7. Tap that blue firmware version link (Release Notes link).
expected: A popup is displayed showing the release notes for the available firmware update, similar to the release notes link behavior on the device home page.
